metadata.description: The subject is a woman in her 40s with fair skin, showing some fine lines around the eyes and forehead. Her face is oval-shaped with a defined jawline. She has short, dark brown hair, styled in a slightly messy pixie cut, with a natural hairline. Her eyes are a warm amber color, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart. Her eyebrows are medium thickness and gently arched. The nose is straight with a slightly rounded tip. Her lips are medium thickness with a natural, gentle curve. There are faint smile lines around her eyes and mouth. Her features suggest a mixed heritage. She has a soft, closed-mouth smile and her head is tilted slightly to the right.
metadata.anchor: Woman with amber eyes and short dark hair.
